ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
Language: jupyter-notebook
Developer Asset Hub for NVIDIA Nemotron — A one-stop resource for training recipes, usage cookbooks, datasets, and full end-to-end reference examples to build with Nemotron models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/cosmos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/cosmos
Language: jupyter-notebook
NVIDIA Cosmos is an open platform of world models, datasets, and tools that enables developers to build Physical AI for robots, autonomous vehicles, smart infrastructure, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Pierian-Data/Complete-Python-3-Bootcamp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Pierian-Data/Complete-Python-3-Bootcamp
Language: jupyter-notebook
Course Files for Complete Python 3 Bootcamp Course on Udemy

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QwenLM/Qwen3-VL
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-VL
Language: jupyter-notebook
Qwen3-VL is the multimodal large language model series developed by Qwen team, Alibaba Cloud.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ageron/handson-mlp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ageron/handson-mlp
Language: jupyter-notebook
A series of Jupyter notebooks that walk you through the fundamentals of Machine Learning and Deep Learning in Python using Scikit-Learn, PyTorch, and Hugging Face libraries.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: crewAIInc/crewAI-examples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/crewAIInc/crewAI-examples
Language: jupyter-notebook
A collection of examples that show how to use CrewAI framework to automate workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/dinov3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/dinov3
Language: jupyter-notebook
Reference PyTorch implementation and models for DINOv3

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/sam2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/sam2
Language: jupyter-notebook
The repository provides code for running inference with the Meta Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM 2), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/segment-anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/segment-anything
Language: jupyter-notebook
The repository provides code for running inference with the SegmentAnything Model (SAM), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-gemma/cookbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-gemma/cookbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
A collection of guides and examples for the Gemma open models from Google.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/AI-For-Beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/AI-For-Beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
12 Weeks, 24 Lessons, AI for All!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
21 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI
